title: virgiliojr94/book-to-skill
abstract: Turn any technical book PDF into a Claude Code skill — ready to study, reference, and use while you work. Automatically extracts knowledge from PDFs and creates structured, runnable AI agent skills.
abstract_zh: 别再翻烂厚重的技术书了！Virgiliojr94 的「book-to-skill」工具能把你那堆PDF都变成活生生的Claude Code技能，随时拿来自学、查阅和工作使用。就像从书中召唤出会干活的小精灵一样，知识自动提炼，结构清晰可运行，让你瞬间化身技术大神！
